Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.Authenticator

Packages that use Authenticator
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth
OAuth 2.0 / OIDC integration for the Juneau REST server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
OpenID Connect Relying Party (RP) login support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml
SAML 2.0 assertion validation for the Juneau REST server, layered on the AuthFilter framework.

  • Uses of Authenticator in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth that implement Authenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ApiKeyAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that authenticates requests via a raw API-key string.
    class 
    AuthFilter
    Abstract base class for Juneau authentication servlet filters.
    class 
    AuthFilterChain
    Orchestrates multiple AuthFilter instances with first-success principal resolution, role aggregation, and all-failure aggregation semantics.
    class 
    BearerTokenAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that authenticates requests via the RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth with parameters of type Authenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RestAuthenticator
    RestAuthenticator.of(Authenticator a)
    Adapts any Authenticator (e.g. an AuthFilter or AuthFilterChain bean) into a RestAuthenticator.

  • Uses of Authenticator in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth that implement Authenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    OAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that authenticates requests carrying an OAuth 2.0 / OIDC access token via the standard RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.

  • Uses of Authenticator in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp that implement Authenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    OidcSessionAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that resolves the OIDC Relying Party session cookie into a ClaimsPrincipal on each request, so RoleBasedRestGuard and @Auth Principal injection see the filter-resolved identity (via AuthenticatedRequestWrapper) with zero downstream changes.

  • Uses of Authenticator in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml that implement Authenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SamlAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that authenticates requests carrying a SAML 2.0 <samlp:Response> delivered via the SamlBinding.POST or SamlBinding.REDIRECT HTTP binding.
